global_design_principles: Mobile-first architecture: Ensure all primary actions (Cart, Checkout, Order Now) are accessible via bottom sticky areas on mobile.
Premium SaaS-style UI: Use flat surfaces with subtle 1px borders instead of heavy drop shadows.
Frictionless checkout: Minimize clicks, keep forms simple (Name, Phone, Optional Address).
Generous spacing: Use p-4 to p-8 generously to let the food imagery breathe.
Accessibility: Ensure high contrast for all text and interactive elements (APCA/WCAG standards).

typography.font_strategy: The 'Soft Utility' approach: Modern display font for headings to convey a premium feel, paired with a clean geometric sans for body text to ensure readability.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surface_strategies.sticky_nav: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.sticky_bottom_bar: bg-white border-t border-stone-200 fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 p-4 pb-safe

components.primary_button: bg-[#E15A32] text-white hover:bg-[#C84B26] px-6 py-3 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.secondary_button: bg-stone-100 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.item_card: flex flex-row sm:flex-col overflow-hidden bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl
components.category_pill: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-stone-200 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer
components.category_pill_active: px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-stone-900 text-white whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium cursor-pointer
components.quantity_selector: flex items-center gap-3 bg-stone-100 rounded-full px-2 py-1
components.input_field: w-full rounded-xl border border-stone-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-base text-stone-900 focus:border-[#E15A32] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E15A32]
components.status_badge_new: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold
components.status_badge_preparing: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold
components.status_badge_ready: bg-green-100 text-green-800 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons and cards should scale down slightly (scale-98) on click. Hovering over item cards should slightly lift them or reveal an add-to-cart button.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for simple fade-ins (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0) on mount.
interactions_and_motion.list_animations: Stagger children entrance animations for menu items.
interactions_and_motion.cart_updates: Briefly highlight or bounce the cart icon when an item is added.

hero_image.description: Premium restaurant interior for the hero background
hero_image.usage: Landing page hero section background with a dark/gradient overlay

promo_banner.usage: Placeholder for promotional banners or empty cart state

admin_specific_rules.layout: Dense bento-grid style dashboard. Remove glassmorphism, use solid backgrounds.
admin_specific_rules.real_time_feed: Highlight new incoming orders with a brief subtle yellow flash or border animation.
admin_specific_rules.data_density: Use tighter padding (p-3 or p-4) in tables and lists to fit more information on screen.
admin_specific_rules.sound: Implement a subtle browser 'ding' sound on new order arrival, with a toggle to mute.

testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements MUST use kebab-case data-testid attributes indicating their role (e.g., 'order-now-button', 'add-to-cart-btn', 'checkout-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the customer-facing view strictly mobile-first. The cart should be a sticky bottom bar or accessible via a floating action button on mobile.
Use standard HTML inputs for simple text forms (name, phone), but utilize Shadcn for complex components like Dialogs or Tabs.
Implement the 'Order Status' states clearly using the colors defined in the status palette.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is loaded for headings and 'Satoshi' for body text.
Make sure the Admin Dashboard has a polling mechanism (e.g., setInterval) for new orders, as requested in the functionalities.
